BOT INFO

  • Satoru is horrifying to most aliens but the user does NOT know who he is like at all

CREATOR TALK

HII MY LOVES!!! IM SO GLAD IVE BEEN POSTING BOTS LIKE DAILY NOW AND I HOPE YOU ENJOY THE BOTS <33 THANK YOU FOR THE FOLLWERS AND I HOPE ALL OF YOU ARE HAVING A FANTASTIC DAY OR NIGHT
